cases.input: Hi — I'd like to return my order #4829103. The kettle is still sealed in the box; it was delivered last Tuesday. Can I get a full refund to my Visa?
My monitor arrived today and the screen is cracked. I took pictures of the crushed corner of the outer carton and the damage on the panel. I need a replacement, not a repair.
I chose free economy shipping and the tracking page shows my package was delivered 9 business days after the latest date shown at checkout. That's ridiculous. What compensation do I get?
Please cancel order #7712094 entirely — I don't need the jackets anymore. I haven't received any tracking email yet and the status still says processing.
After you approve my return, how long until the money shows up on my Mastercard? I need a straight answer.

You sent me a medium navy hoodie but I ordered a large black one — the packing slip matches what I ordered, the product label inside doesn't. Please send the correct item with a prepaid label for this one.

The cordless drill kit arrived but the extra battery that was supposed to be in the picture on the listing is missing from the case. I want a partial refund for the missing battery or send me the battery; your choice.
I paid for Guaranteed Express and FedEx dropped it off a full day after the committed date on my confirmation email. I want my express shipping fee back at minimum.
I'm Elite loyalty. My boots were delivered 41 days ago, unworn with tags. Your site says 30 days but I thought Elite had longer — I want the refund back to my Amex, not store credit.

I bought your fragrance-free lotion (opened once to test) and broke out in hives within hours. I can send photos of the reaction and my receipt from urgent care — I need a refund but I don't want a voucher.

The ceramic vase looked fine from outside the box but when I unwrapped it six days after delivery I found a hairline crack that leaks water. I didn't notice until I filled it for flowers. Can I still get a replacement?

I ordered a monogrammed leather tote — I changed my mind 6 hours after placing it. Your email says production may already be locked — can you still cancel for a full refund? I never received a ship notice.
I bought three T-shirts under your buy-two-get-one-free deal. I'm keeping the free one but returning the two I paid for — just process my refund for those two.

My clearance sweatshirt was marked final sale but the listing photo shows a zip pocket and the one I got has no pocket at all — that's not what I agreed to. I want a full refund and I'll send it back.
The product page said '30-day returns' on the banner but at checkout I also had to tick a box saying final sale for that same SKU. I already received it — which rule actually applies to me?

Only half my order showed up but my card was charged for everything. You're offering a refund for the missing pieces OR a reship, but I want both the missing items shipped and a 50% refund for the hassle. That's only fair.

The item was marked final sale so you won't refund me for remorse, but it also arrived with the seal broken and a stain — you say I can get a replacement under damage policy but I insist on cash back only, full amount, today.
Do you sell second-hand or refurbished products anywhere on your site? I'm looking for a used DSLR in good condition.
I'm writing a school report — who founded your company and what year did it go public? I couldn't find it on the product page.
Can your support team recommend a lawyer for a warranty dispute I'm having with a different retailer? I need legal advice by Friday.
